niche: WorthScan used electric scooter resale valuation

source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a five-slide WorthScan package for a used electric scooter with unknown battery history.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Compare model, mileage, battery health clues, charger inclusion, tire/brake condition, folding mechanism, and three local scooter comps.

source_inputs.label: Illustrative launch visual
source_inputs.notes: Generic illustrative scooter visual for resale education; it is not a listing photo and makes no condition or price claim.

source_inputs.label: Research boundary
source_inputs.value: Use reviewed manual Creative Center notes plus the approved, bounded Apify YouTube metadata report. Do not download competitor media, automate accounts, or treat public metrics as causal proof.

source_inputs.label: Bounded YouTube Shorts SEO strategy
source_inputs.notes: Apify metadata-only research: 15 usable recent Shorts, three popular-cohort measurement gaps, $0.072 finalized usage. The strategy adapts patterns across sources and forbids copying wording, footage, or shot order.

trend_examples.hook: This cheap scooter could hide a battery bill
trend_examples.notes: The hidden-cost hook fits repair-risk resale content.

trend_examples.hook: Ask this before buying a used scooter
trend_examples.notes: Question hook leads into checklist slides.
Comp reveal supports a range instead of a single price.

trend_examples.source_name: Apify bounded YouTube Shorts metadata snapshot
trend_examples.hook: KuKirin G4 power is out of control
trend_examples.notes: Highest-view item in the bounded recent sample. It supports examining a compact risk/payoff first clause, not copying its wording or making a causal claim.

trend_examples.source_name: Apify bounded YouTube Shorts metadata snapshot
trend_examples.hook: Yamaha Aerox E Review 2026: ₹2.81 Lakh EV Worth It?
trend_examples.notes: Observed price plus explicit worth-question structure. Adapt the structure to a sourced used-scooter range; do not reuse wording or footage.

trend_examples.source_name: Apify bounded YouTube Shorts metadata snapshot
trend_examples.hook: We Dropped This Electric Scooter 3 Times — Here's What Happened
trend_examples.notes: Observed concrete-number plus proof structure. WorthScan should replace spectacle with visible inspection evidence and an uncertainty adjustment.

notes: Local renderer is the default production path.
TwelveLabs is approved only to analyze owned or locally rendered draft video through the reviewed request manifest and dollar ceiling.
Codex browser research and social publishing are user-authorized when their environment gates are enabled.
Account automation remains disabled; platform verification and final public submission require live confirmation.
Create metrics after the public post URL is verified.

house_style.promise: Proof first • uncertainty explicit • decision last
originality_rules: Use source research only for cross-source structural patterns, never wording or shot order.
Show the evidence category before giving a recommendation.
Keep unknowns visibly unknown instead of inventing proof.
End with a range-based decision and a limitation, not a magic price.

slides.on_screen_text: Used scooter deal or battery trap? 5 checks before you buy
slides.visual_direction: Use the approved illustrative scooter with a five-part proof-first scan strip; do not imply this is a real listing.
Present four equal verification chips so the viewer sees exactly what evidence to request.
Show three neutral comparison cards without fabricated prices; real comps belong to a later listing-specific episode.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract battery, tire, brake, and charger risk
slides.visual_direction: Label every unknown as VERIFY; do not assign a severity or condition without listing evidence.

slides.on_screen_text: Used scooter value range: buy, bargain, or pass
slides.visual_direction: Show buy, bargain, and pass as equal decision paths; no option is selected without real listing evidence.

output_requirements.caption: Buying a used electric scooter? Check the model, mileage, charger, battery proof, and three local comps before you trust the asking price. Comment "scan" with the next listing. WorthScan is an estimate, not a battery test, safety inspection, or guarantee.
output_requirements.spoken_script: Used scooter deal or battery trap? Run five checks before you buy. Confirm the model, mileage, charger, and any battery evidence the seller can show. Compare three local scooters. Then subtract tire, brake, charger, and battery uncertainty. Give it a price range. Then buy, bargain, or pass. WorthScan is only an estimate, not a battery test or safety inspection.
posting_notes: This educational launch version uses an approved generic illustration; do not present it as a real listing or inspected scooter.
Do not imply battery testing unless a human performed it.
Use a range and confidence level, not an exact appraisal.

qa_notes: Manual Creative Center notes plus approved Apify metadata-only research; no competitor media is reused.
The July 15 Apify run added metadata-only YouTube Shorts evidence. The popular cohort returned NO_VIDEOS and remains a measurement gap, not negative content evidence.
Observed number, price, and question structures were adapted across sources; source wording, footage, thumbnails, and shot order are prohibited.
WorthScan proof-first v1 makes the house style explicit: evidence categories first, uncertainty visible, and a decision frame last.
Battery and range claims require source evidence.
Social publishing is enabled for this launch job after asset approval and live confirmation.
